name: Damien Falorn

sheet.name: Damien Falorn
sheet.background_story: Damien Falorn, a necromancer of human descent, commands the dark arts within the shadowed confines of Detritis Haven. With an enigmatic aura shrouding his every move, he navigates the delicate balance between life and death with unsettling ease. Rumors swirl about his origins, whispered tales of forbidden rituals and ancient pacts with the underworld. Despite his chilling reputation, some speak of a hidden complexity beneath his macabre exterior, hinting at motives obscured by layers of necromantic intrigue. In Detritis Haven, where the line between the living and the dead blurs, Damien Falorn stands as a figure both feared and respected.
